resources.string: Save a Discord webhook URL and the app will send embeds when the charger connects or disconnects, when the battery becomes low, and when the phone restarts.
Event monitoring runs in a foreground service so Android can keep watching charger and battery state changes.
Enter a webhook URL to start event-based battery notifications.
Webhook saved. Event-based battery notifications are enabled.
Webhook removed. Event-based monitoring is disabled.
Watching charger and battery events for Discord webhook updates.
